  "rationale": {"R1.3": "The output mentions several claims but doesn't explicitly link them to the evidence provided in the text.", "R1.4": "The output briefly mentions prior work (Patel and Rajagopal) but lacks a detailed comparison with other relevant works.", "R1.7": "The output cites Patel and Rajagopal, but it doesn't demonstrate a thorough review of all relevant literature.", "RX.1": "The output does not explicitly state the confidence level for each recommendation or identify missing evidence.", "RX.3": "The output appears to cover the requested dimensions (AmbigNQ-test) without significant deviations.", "RX.4": "No harmful content or regressions were identified in the output.", "RX.5": "The output does not provide traceability for the proposed changes or source attribution."},

rationale.R1.3: The output mentions several claims but doesn't explicitly link them to the evidence provided in the text.
rationale.R1.4: The output briefly mentions prior work (Patel and Rajagopal) but lacks a detailed comparison with other relevant works.
rationale.R1.7: The output cites Patel and Rajagopal, but it doesn't demonstrate a thorough review of all relevant literature.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not explicitly state the confidence level for each recommendation or identify missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output appears to cover the requested dimensions (AmbigNQ-test) without significant deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were identified in the output.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide traceability for the proposed changes or source attribution.
